headline: Lilly Advances Gene Therapy, Snaps Up Vaccine Makers. It’s Looking Beyond Weight Loss.
summary: Eli Lilly  shares were little changed after the pharmaceutical giant reported promising early data for an experimental heart-disease gene therapy.  The pharmaceutical giant said Monday that a single infusion of its gene therapy candidate, Verve-102, reduced PCSK9 protein levels by up to 88% and lowered LDL cholesterol by as much as 62%.  PCSK9 is a protein that regulates cholesterol levels in the bloodstream.

content.title: Lilly Advances Gene Therapy, Snaps Up Vaccine Makers. It’s Looking Beyond Weight Loss.
content.summary: Eli Lilly  shares were little changed after the pharmaceutical giant reported promising early data for an experimental heart-disease gene therapy.  The pharmaceutical giant said Monday that a single infusion of its gene therapy candidate, Verve-102, reduced PCSK9 protein levels by up to 88% and lowered LDL cholesterol by as much as 62%.  PCSK9 is a protein that regulates cholesterol levels in the bloodstream.

The transactions advance Lilly's strategy of investing in differentiated technology platforms to address significant health problems.

The transactions advance Lilly's strategy of investing in differentiated technology platforms to address significant health problems.

headline: Ozempic, Other Weight Drug Users Cut Back On Eating Out. What That Means For Restaurants.
summary: Weight-loss drugs such as Novo Nordisk's Ozempic and Wegovy are disrupting eating habits, and restaurants should prepare for changes, an analyst says.  More than half of Americans taking GLP-1 drugs including Eli Lilly's Mounjaro have changed their eating habits, a survey by UBS found.  "Our survey results suggest GLP-1 users are more likely to eat less calories while taking GLP-1 drugs, with survey respondents dining out less, changing eating habits, and appreciating healthier foods more," UBS analysts led by Dennis Geiger said in a note to clients.

content.title: Ozempic, Other Weight Drug Users Cut Back On Eating Out. What That Means For Restaurants.
content.summary: Weight-loss drugs such as Novo Nordisk's Ozempic and Wegovy are disrupting eating habits, and restaurants should prepare for changes, an analyst says.  More than half of Americans taking GLP-1 drugs including Eli Lilly's Mounjaro have changed their eating habits, a survey by UBS found.  "Our survey results suggest GLP-1 users are more likely to eat less calories while taking GLP-1 drugs, with survey respondents dining out less, changing eating habits, and appreciating healthier foods more," UBS analysts led by Dennis Geiger said in a note to clients.

headline: Walmart Joins Russell 3000 Elite As Investors Weigh Q1 Shakeup
summary: Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT) is set to enter the top 10 of the Russell 3000 Index during the June 2026 reconstitution, replacing Eli Lilly. The index change follows Q1 results where Walmart reported record sales alongside a cautious earnings outlook that triggered a sharp stock pullback. Two senior executives are leaving the company as Walmart reshapes its leadership team and refines its long term priorities. headline: Micron's valuation hits $1T, nearly tied with Eli Lilly & Berkshire

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at Micron's market action in the video above.
